basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Jodhpur CRISPI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 8 Project Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR), Jodhpur
basic_details.post_name: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC), Project Technical Support III (2 posts), Project Technical Support II
basic_details.short_information: ICMR NIHR Jodhpur has released the CRISPI Project Recruitment 2026 notification, inviting eligible candidates for 8 temporary project human resource positions under the "ICMR Task Force Study on Epidemiology of Chronic Respiratory Illness in Select Population Groups in India (CRISPI)" project. This is a Notification Released recruitment with the Walk-In Interview / Written Test scheduled for 10.07.2026; there is no separate online application start or last date since candidates apply by hand on the day of the walk-in.

age_limit.details: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC): Not exceeding 28 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Project Technical Support III (Post 2 and Post 3): Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Project Technical Support II: Not exceeding 30 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. | Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates, retrenched Government employees, departmental candidates (including project staff), and Ex-servicemen, as per Central Government/ DoPT/ ICMR instructions issued from time to time. Age concession is also admissible to the extent of service rendered in other research projects for experienced and skilled persons. SC/ ST/ OBC candidates get age relaxation only for positions reserved for their category, not for UR positions.

qualification.details: post name: Qualification | sr. project assistant (udc): 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized board with 5 years' experience in administration/accounts work, OR Graduate in any discipline with 2 years' experience in administration/accounts work; along with a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (KDPH) on a computer. | project technical support iii (post 2): Master's degree in Environmental Science / Occupational Health / Environmental Engineering or related discipline, OR three-year graduate degree in the same fields with three years of post-qualification experience. | project technical support iii (post 3): Three-year graduate degree in Microbiology / Biology / Virology / Life Sciences with three years' post-qualification experience, OR Postgraduate degree in Microbiology / Biology / Virology / Life Sciences. | project technical support ii: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) with five years' experience in fieldwork and data collection, OR three-year Graduate degree with two years' experience in fieldwork and data collection.

salary_details.project technical support iii (post 3): Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month, fixed without any other allowances
salary_details.details: Tenure for all posts is initially up to one year, extendable as per norms; positions may be terminated at any time. Emoluments are project-specific and depend on fund availability from the funding agency.

selection_process: Only eligible candidates will appear for the Walk-In Interview/Written Test. If more than 30 candidates apply for a post
a written test will be conducted. Qualifying marks: SC/ST - 35%

UR/OBC/EWS - 40%. Candidates who qualify the written test will be shortlisted for interview based on the post-wise number of candidates to be interviewed (see table below). Final merit is prepared based on combined marks of the written test and interview. If a written test is not conducted (fewer than 30 candidates)
merit is based solely on interview marks. Selection is also subject to qualifying a skill test

Duly filled application form (downloaded from the official website) One set of self-attested photocopies of all certificates All original certificates for verification (mandatory - candidature will not be considered without them) Educational qualification certificates from SSC/10th onwards No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer
if already employed (compulsory if currently working in an ICMR project) SC/ST/OBC/EWS certificate
wherever applicable Experience certificate(s) clearly stating the nature of work and dates of employment Aadhaar Card PwBD Certificate
if applicable (for age relaxation) Passport-size photograph
how_to_apply: Download the application form from niirncd.icmr.org.in or icmr.gov.in.
Fill the application form completely and accurately.
Attach one set of self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates.
Report in person at ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur on 10.07.2026 between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM, carrying the filled form, photocopies, and all original certificates for verification.
Candidates already employed must also carry a No Objection Certificate from their present employer/Principal Investigator.
Candidates applying for more than one project position must apply separately for each position.

content_sections.heading: What is This Recruitment About?
content_sections.text: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR), Jodhpur is recruiting 8 candidates for 4 project posts - Sr. Project Assistant (UDC), Project Technical Support III (2 posts), and Project Technical Support II under the CRISPI project. Selection is through walk-in interview/written test on 10.07.2026 at ICMR NIHR, Jodhpur. These are temporary, project-based positions with consolidated pay/HRA. Organization: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR), Jodhpur Post Name: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC), Project Technical Support III, Project Technical Support II Total Vacancies: 8 Apply Mode: Walk-In (by hand, with application form and documents) Walk-in date : 10.07.2026 Qualification: 12th Pass to Postgraduate depending on post (see Eligibility section) Age Limit: 28 to 35 years depending on post (see Age Limit section)

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIHR CRISPI Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: Candidates can download the application form and read the complete notification from the official ICMR-NIHR websites. A direct PDF link was not confirmed in the source material, so candidates should visit the links below. Official Notification PDF: Click Here Official Website: http://niirncd.icmr.org.in / https://www.icmr.gov.in

rows.icmr_national_institute_of_health_resear: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC), Project Technical Support III (2 posts), Project Technical Support II

rows.qualification: 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized board with 5 years' experience in administration/accounts work, OR Graduate in any discipline with 2 years' experience in administration/accounts work; along with a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (KDPH) on a computer.

Master's degree in Environmental Science / Occupational Health / Environmental Engineering or related discipline, OR three-year graduate degree in the same fields with three years of post-qualification experience.

Three-year graduate degree in Microbiology / Biology / Virology / Life Sciences with three years' post-qualification experience, OR Postgraduate degree in Microbiology / Biology / Virology / Life Sciences.
12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) with five years' experience in fieldwork and data collection, OR three-year Graduate degree with two years' experience in fieldwork and data collection.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC): Not exceeding 28 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Project Technical Support III (Post 2 and Post 3): Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Project Technical Support II: Not exceeding 30 years as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates, retrenched Government employees, departmental candidates (including project staff), and Ex-servicemen, as per Central Government/ DoPT/ ICMR instructions issued from time to time. Age concession is also admissible to the extent of service rendered in other research projects for experienced and skilled persons. SC/ ST/ OBC candidates get age relaxation only for positions reserved for their category, not for UR positions.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Tenure for all posts is initially up to one year, extendable as per norms; positions may be terminated at any time. Emoluments are project-specific and depend on fund availability from the funding agency.

rows.remuneration: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month, fixed without any other allowances

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Only eligible candidates will appear for the Walk-In Interview/Written Test. If more than 30 candidates apply for a post, a written test will be conducted. Qualifying marks: SC/ST - 35%, UR/OBC/EWS - 40%. Candidates who qualify the written test will be shortlisted for interview based on the post-wise number of candidates to be interviewed (see table below). Final merit is prepared based on combined marks of the written test and interview. If a written test is not conducted (fewer than 30 candidates), merit is based solely on interview marks. Selection is also subject to qualifying a skill test, wherever applicable. Duly filled application form (downloaded from the official website) One set of self-attested photocopies of all certificates All original certificates for verification (mandatory - candidature will not be considered without them) Educational qualification certificates from SSC/10th onwards No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer, if already employed (compulsory if currently working in an ICMR project) SC/ST/OBC/EWS certificate, wherever applicable Experience certificate(s) clearly stating the nature of work and dates of employment Aadhaar Card PwBD Certificate, if applicable (for age relaxation) Passport-size photograph

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICMR NIHR CRISPI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form from niirncd.icmr.org.in or icmr.gov.in . Fill the application form completely and accurately. Attach one set of self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates. Report in person at ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur on 10.07.2026 between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM, carrying the filled form, photocopies, and all original certificates for verification. Candidates already employed must also carry a No Objection Certificate from their present employer/Principal Investigator. Candidates applying for more than one project position must apply separately for each position.

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification Link: Click Here Official Website Link: http://niirncd.icmr.org.in / https://www.icmr.gov.in The ICMR NIHR Jodhpur CRISPI Recruitment 2026 is a good opportunity for eligible candidates to join a national-level health research project through a walk-in interview on 10.07.2026. Candidates should carefully check the eligibility criteria, prepare all required original certificates and photocopies, and reach the venue on time, as late reporting will not be entertained. Keep visiting the official ICMR NIHR website for any updates or changes to the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the ICMR NIHR CRISPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a walk-in interview/written test recruitment by ICMR-National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur for 8 temporary project positions under the CRISPI project, covering Sr. Project Assistant (UDC) and Project Technical Support-II/III posts.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies across four posts: Sr. Project Assistant (UDC) - 2, Project Technical Support-III - 2 (one each in two disciplines), and Project Technical Support-II - 4.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in interview date for ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview/written test is scheduled for 10.07.2026, from 09:00 AM to 10:00 AM, at ICMR-NIHR, Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ICMR NIHR CRISPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 28 years for Sr. Project Assistant (UDC), 35 years for Project Technical Support-III posts, and 30 years for Project Technical Support-II, as on the date of the walk-in interview/written test. Age relaxation applies as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Project Technical Support posts at ICMR NIHR?
faq.answer: Project Technical Support-III posts carry Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month, and Project Technical Support-II carries Rs. 20,000/- + HRA per month. Sr. Project Assistant (UDC) carries Rs. 17,000/- per month (Consolidated).

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the ICMR NIHR walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need the filled application form, one set of self-attested photocopies of certificates, and all original certificates for verification, along with Aadhaar card, category certificate (if applicable), experience certificates, and a passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ICMR NIHR Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a walk-in interview, with a written test conducted only if more than 30 candidates apply for a post. Final merit is based on written test and interview marks, or interview marks alone if no written test is held.
